criterion_bindings.summary: postmortem-maker: refused: cannot draft a traceable postmortem. Unresolved: postmortem_policy is missing or not an object, so publish gating and required sections cannot be resolved; no incident evidence was supplied (incident_timeline, alerts, deploy_events, and chat_notes are all empty). Every timeline entry and root-cause claim must cite input evidence; supply evidence records and a postmortem_policy, then rerun.
